creator: brett@peloton.physics.montana.edu
text:
Hi,

> >Synopsis:       afterstep-devel build fails on scsi.h

> >Fix:
> assume problem with new CAM-based scsi headers.

Yes this is the problem.  If you delete the <include scsi.h> you'll be
able to compile.  I'm not sure how to fix this as this is required for
STABLE yet.  

Brett
